description: Minute fragment of accounts. Dated Muḥarram 1003 AH on the verso. The recto mentions an Ottoman military officer Maḥmūd Çavuş in the heading as well as Qūndī(?) ʿUmr and Moshe Kohen in line 2. The verso refers collectively to Çavuşiyya (ג'אושיה) in the missing accounts' heading. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
